hero.title: Working flows,
hero.description: Three composable flows, all running on Ergo testnet. Each includes the contract logic, Fleet SDK code, and the exact steps to reproduce.

demos.testedOn: Tested on Ergo testnet. Get test ERG at

apiCall.title: Agent buys API call
apiCall.tagline: One call. One proof. No persistent account.
apiCall.description: An autonomous agent creates a note, sends it to an API provider. The provider validates the acceptance predicate on-chain and delivers the response. No API keys, no billing accounts, no Stripe.
flow: Agent creates a note (0.001 ERG face value)
Note contains: provider address + task hash + deadline
Provider checks predicate — verified on Ergo testnet
Note burned, ERG released to provider
apiCall.why: This is the atomic unit of agent commerce: one task, one payment, one proof. No identity required.

credit.title: Agent pays on credit
credit.tagline: Reserve deployed. Notes issued. Tracker monitors.
credit.description: A reserve is deployed with collateral. Notes are issued against it up to a credit limit. An agent spends notes over time. The tracker monitors total usage. When the threshold is reached, the reserve auto-settles.
flow: Reserve contract deployed with 10 ERG + 100 ERG credit limit
Notes issued against reserve (up to limit)
Agent transfers notes to providers as payment
credit.why: Credit is fundamental to economic efficiency. This implements it without a bank — just contracts and cryptographic proofs.

community.title: Community reserve + tracker
community.tagline: A local marketplace. A compute co-op. An agent network.
community.description: A group of participants pool ERG into a shared reserve. Community notes are issued proportionally. Acceptance predicates define membership rules. Members can redeem notes for ERG at any time from the reserve.
flow: Community members pool ERG into multi-sig reserve
Members receive community notes proportional to contribution
Notes accepted within community per acceptance rules
Any member can redeem notes for ERG anytime
Tracker provides public auditability of flows
community.why: This is the most general form: a programmable local economy. Could be a marketplace, a DAO treasury, or an agent cooperative.

openProblems.title: What's still unsolved
openProblems.description: These are the most interesting open problems in agent money. If any of these resonate — we want to hear from you.
openProblems.talkToUs: Talk to us about your use case

items.title: Agent identity without persistent accounts
items.desc: How do agents build reputation across sessions without deanonymisation?

items.title: Note acceptance UX for non-technical agents
items.desc: SDK-level abstraction so LLM agents can issue and accept notes with minimal setup.

items.title: Tracker federation across reserves
items.desc: Cross-reserve accounting and liquidity — can notes be accepted across different community reserves?

items.title: Agent reputation without centralized oracle
items.desc: Verifiable reputation score derived from on-chain history, no trusted third party.

items.title: Local community wallet — one-click deploy
items.desc: Spin up a community reserve, issue tokens, and configure acceptance rules in under 5 minutes.

agentEconomy.desc: Why Ergo is the right base layer

playground.title: Generate your first agent payment
playground.description: Paste your Ergo testnet address. We fetch your live UTxOs and generate a ready-to-run Fleet SDK script — pre-filled with your actual data.
playground.runStep3: Copy the unsigned TX JSON output
playground.errorNotFound: Address not found on testnet. Make sure it's a valid Ergo testnet address.
playground.errorNoUtxos: No UTxOs found. Get free testnet ERG at testnet.ergofaucet.org — takes 30 seconds.
playground.errorNetwork: Could not reach testnet API. Check your network connection.

lookup.title: Address balance lookup
lookup.description: Query any Ergo address balance live from the blockchain. Real data, real network.
lookup.errorNotFound: Address not found or invalid. Check that it's a valid Ergo address.
lookup.errorNetwork: Could not reach Ergo API. Check your network connection.
